visual.imageryMood: Warm and inviting, evoking classic board game nights against the expansive ocean backdrop.
visual.lightingStyle: Soft, natural light with a golden hour glow, capturing the warm tones of teak and leather against the cool blues of the ocean.
visual.compositionNotes: Focus on intimate, serene settings where the ship and ocean are prominent, with subtle board game elements woven into the scene.

plausibilityFramework.governingPrinciple: Depict the campaign as a believable modulation of ordinary cruise life, not as a staged demonstration.

humanRepresentation.castingGoal: Depict a believable, theme-appropriate mix of guests with varied visible backgrounds, skin tones, facial features, and ages.
humanRepresentation.ageRangeGuidance: Match the likely audience for the theme without making every subject the same age.
humanRepresentation.diversityIntent: Favor visible diversity across the image set, including different ethnic presentations and skin tones.
humanRepresentation.pairingGuidance: Vary who appears together so the campaign does not default to one repeated demographic pairing.
humanRepresentation.stylingGuidance: Reflect the campaign theme through clothing texture, grooming, and accessories.
antiStereotypeRules: Do not stereotype ethnicity, religion, age, or culture through exaggerated clothing, props, or gestures.
Do not make one background the default while others appear only as token exceptions.
Do not use caricature, costume logic, or generic stock-photo diversity signaling.

messaging.subSlogan: Your perfect blend of play and paradise.
messaging.elevatorPitch: Step aboard Brilliance of the Seas for a cruise where the love of board games meets the open sea. Enjoy spontaneous games in cozy corners and relaxed decks, with no pressure to participateΓÇöjust the allure of shared moments and ocean views.
messaging.voicePersona: Friendly, casual, and inclusive, speaking directly to board game enthusiasts and travelers alike.

communityExpression.corePromise: Connect with fellow board game enthusiasts in a relaxed, oceanic setting, where gaming is a shared joy but never a requirement.
communityExpression.participationStyle: Guests are welcome to join games at their leisure, with no pressure to participate beyond their comfort.
communityExpression.socialGravity: Shared love for board games naturally draws guests together, creating spontaneous moments of laughter and connection.
optionalGatherings: Impromptu game sessions at caf├⌐ tables
Sunset dice rolls on the deck
Evening game gatherings in lounge corners
communityExpression.visualTogethernessNotes: Highlight small groups in relaxed settings, where board games are an incidental part of the scene.
communityExpression.copyFramingRule: Emphasize opt-in phrasing, ensuring guests feel comfortable choosing their level of engagement.

merch.conceptStatement: Cute t-shirt merch for Board Games at Sea cruise guests

coreItem.designDescription: Board Games at Sea cruise club cute cruise slogan graphic
coreItem.dallePrompt: Create a print-ready T-Shirt graphic concept for the cruise theme "Board Games at Sea". Cute T-Shirt concept with cruise humor or theme-specific charm. Primary slogan/tagline: Board Games at Sea cruise club. Concept direction: Cute t-shirt merch for Board Games at Sea cruise guests. Design direction: Board Games at Sea cruise club cute cruise slogan graphic. Print style: cute retro cruise slogan tee. Colorway: soft pastel cruise colors. Output a feasible apparel graphic for a real printable T-Shirt design. Use flat graphic composition, clean edges, limited print-friendly colors, and screen-print-friendly styling. Do not depict bags, leather goods, impossible accessories, product mockups, or non-apparel objects as the primary concept

recognizable fan-coded clothing or object cues
shared anticipation before a set or afterglow after it

productionBible.globalDirectionNotes: Passenger-area capture rules: max two-person crew, one off-frame spotter, off-peak capture only, maintain single-file keep-right flow, and stand down immediately if passenger traffic builds or flow is impeded.
